subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Maps JavaScript API
subproducts.rationale: The claim’s second terminal automatically inputs location data into a display unit that shows a map including the first address, which aligns most closely with the Maps JavaScript API’s map display and customization features.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Maps SDK for Android
subproducts.rationale: A mobile terminal with a map display unit receiving location-based data and rendering a map is consistent with the Android Maps SDK’s in-app map display capabilities.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Maps SDK for iOS
subproducts.rationale: The claim describes a terminal device that receives location data and displays a map, which matches the iOS Maps SDK’s embedded map and location presentation features.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Places API
subproducts.rationale: The first terminal correlates an address to location-based data, and the Places API documentation explicitly covers retrieving location data and place details for addresses and places.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Geocoding API
subproducts.rationale: The claim’s database correlates a first address to location-based data, which is the core function of geocoding and address-to-coordinate lookup.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Routes API
subproducts.rationale: The dispatch workflow implies sending event and location data conditionally based on criteria, which often pairs with routing and travel-time calculations used in dispatch systems.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Distance Matrix API
subproducts.rationale: A dispatch system commonly evaluates whether location-based criteria are met using travel distance and time between terminals and addresses, which is the Distance Matrix API’s documented purpose.

subproducts.name: Google Maps Platform | Navigation SDK
subproducts.rationale: The claim’s terminal-side map display and dispatch-oriented location exchange are closest to navigation-oriented SDK documentation that supports live guidance and driver/rider experiences.
